name: Nicole C.
subject: I won & you can too, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44492273:6YjFblLN7:m:1:1349778030:8AF088C4E54E76F456F4EC655F9B1509:r)
---
| | | | Peter -- I just couldn't believe it when this summer, Eric from the Rubio campaign HQ called me to tell me the news that I had won the Cleveland Debate Contest and my daughter and I would be flying to Ohio for the first Republican presidential debate. We had a blast -- and the campaign took care of everything. It was fun to be in the arena, in person, (completely different from watching on TV) cheering on Marco as he won the first debate. I honestly didn't expect to win, but I still donated to help out Marco. But take it from me: real people DO win these contests. [_**Click here to enter by donating $10 or more right now.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44492274:6YjFblLN7:m:1:1349778030:8AF088C4E54E76F456F4EC655F9B1509:r) You just might win -- and you won't regret supporting Marco and the campaign. It's truly a win-win. Good luck! Nicole C.Tennessee [_**P.S. The contest ends on Wednesday, so don't miss your chance to enter by clicking here and donating.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44492274:6YjFblLN7:m:1:1349778030:8AF088C4E54E76F456F4EC655F9B1509:r)
---
| **Boulder Debate Contest Rules**
* Contest ends October 21, 2015.
* Limit one entry per individual
* Make a contribution and also enter
* [You can also enter here without making a contribution](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44492275:6YjFblLN7:m:1:1349778030:8AF088C4E54E76F456F4EC655F9B1509:r)
* See full terms & conditions below.

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44492276:6YjFblLN7:m:1:1349778030:8AF088C4E54E76F456F4EC655F9B1509:r)
To enter without making a contribution, [click here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44492275:6YjFblLN7:m:1:1349778030:8AF088C4E54E76F456F4EC655F9B1509:r) Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on October 13, 2015 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Daylight Time and ends on October 21, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time ("Entry Period"). All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time on October 21, 2015. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Boulder, CO on October 28, 2015; roundtrip airfare for the winner and a guest; hotel accommodations for winner and guest . Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Prize not redeemable for cash. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. The Sponsor is Marco Rubio for President, PO Box 558701, Miami, Florida, 33255.
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Too many emails? Click [here](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive updates less often.[
Unsubscribe](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: I'm going to be point blank.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

I'm going to be point blank.

The Washington Machine, the national media, and fat-cat lobbyists want nothing more than to drown out my message of liberty and limited government.

And without your immediate support, that'll become a reality.

That's why my campaign has launched a bold and aggressive TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa during and after the next Republican presidential debate.

I'm confident this TV and Radio Ad Blitz is just what we need to build on my first place showing in the three biggest straw polls of the primary season.

So my campaign needs an emergency influx of funds.

But the deadline is less than 48 hours away and I need your immediate support.

**[Can I count on you to chip in right now](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31093611:sFB_KqmjN:m:1:879035888:5D42928006660A690F5F19EDE82F4F59:r)**?

With my decisive victory at one of the biggest straw polls in New Hampshire, the Establishment is doubling-down in their efforts to stamp out my campaign and silence my message.

After all, I'm not their handpicked candidate.

My campaign is based on grassroots muscle that's built to last for the long haul.

Your support will give my campaign the vital resources to continue the momentum and flood the airwaves in the key state of Iowa.

With your help, I plan to break through their wall of silence and get my message directly to voters.

**[So please let me know you're still with me in this fight by chipping in a contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31093611:sFB_KqmjN:m:1:879035888:5D42928006660A690F5F19EDE82F4F59:r)**.

My campaign and I are really counting on your support, Fellow Conservative.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31093612:sFB_KqmjN:m:1:879035888:5D42928006660A690F5F19EDE82F4F59:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31093613:sFB_KqmjN:m:1:879035888:5D42928006660A690F5F19EDE82F4F59:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31093614:sFB_KqmjN:m:1:879035888:5D42928006660A690F5F19EDE82F4F59:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31093615:sFB_KqmjN:m:1:879035888:5D42928006660A690F5F19EDE82F4F59:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31093611:sFB_KqmjN:m:1:879035888:5D42928006660A690F5F19EDE82F4F59:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31093611:sFB_KqmjN:m:1:879035888:5D42928006660A690F5F19EDE82F4F59:r)

name: John Kasich
subject: We can balance the budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, I am the only candidate in the race who has announced a plan to balance America's budget.

I'm also the only candidate who has done it before when I led the effort the last time America had a balanced federal budget.
**[Will you chip in $25 or more today to help us get this message out?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31097619:s6pDiqmSN:m:1:958431888:80EB190C2B5EC430E17E198FA02762AF:r)**

**Here's a short video about the announcement of this plan and our New Hampshire bus tour last week:**

**[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31097620:s6pDiqmSN:m:1:958431888:80EB190C2B5EC430E17E198FA02762AF:r)**

**Here's what's being said about our Action Plan to get money, power & influence out of Washington and create jobs:****

**
• **_Norquist called it "a grown-up approach"_**_on spending and "significantly pro-growth" on taxes. He said Kasich's policies were more practical than some plans that call for blowing up the existing tax system. **" Everything on his plate is doable, is achievable," Norquist said**._ -Grover Norquist, President, Americans for Tax Reform ([WMUR](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31097621:s6pDiqmSN:m:1:958431888:80EB190C2B5EC430E17E198FA02762AF:r))

• _" This shifts the focus from giveaways, which we have seen a lot of in this campaign so far, to trade-offs, which is what fixing the budget will require...**the first step is setting the goal of getting the overall debt under control, which Kasich is now one of the few candidates to do.** "_ -Maya MacGuineas, President, Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget ([Wall Street Journal](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31097622:s6pDiqmSN:m:1:958431888:80EB190C2B5EC430E17E198FA02762AF:r))

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31097619:s6pDiqmSN:m:1:958431888:80EB190C2B5EC430E17E198FA02762AF:r)

We'll need your ongoing support to get our message out - **please consider chipping in with a generous contribution to help:** [JohnKasich.com/Donate](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31097619:s6pDiqmSN:m:1:958431888:80EB190C2B5EC430E17E198FA02762AF:r)

**You can also sign up to volunteer in your state:** [JohnKasich.com/Volunteer](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31097623:s6pDiqmSN:m:1:958431888:80EB190C2B5EC430E17E198FA02762AF:r)

Thank you for your help!

-John

**John Kasich
**Governor of Ohio
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31097624:s6pDiqmSN:m:1:958431888:80EB190C2B5EC430E17E198FA02762AF:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31097625:s6pDiqmSN:m:1:958431888:80EB190C2B5EC430E17E198FA02762AF:r)
[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31097626:s6pDiqmSN:m:1:958431888:80EB190C2B5EC430E17E198FA02762AF:r)
Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://email.sermodigital.com/p/is6pDiqmSN). [Update your preferences](http://email.sermodigital.com/p/os6pDiqmSN)

name: Katy Perry
subject: Stand by our gal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Meet me in Iowa? | Friend --

I admire Hillary’s fighting spirit, believe in the vision she has for a better America, and embrace her policies (and pantsuits!). That’s why I’ll be singing at a rally for Hillary in Des Moines this Saturday, October 24th.

You can be at the rally, too! It’s simple. **[Just add your name, and you and a friend will be entered for a chance to fly for free and attend as my special guest.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjM3NzY2ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODg2Njg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

A little bird also tells me there’s going to be another very special guest at the rally who you’re **definitely** going to want to meet.

We’re holding this rally just before Iowa’s famous Jefferson-Jackson dinner, which marks 100 days out from the Iowa caucuses. All the candidates will be there, and as you can imagine, the energy will be electric!

**Let’s Roar together for our Firework, Hillary! You’re all invited.** | [ | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=MjM3NzY2ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODg2Njg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=MjM3NzY2ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODg2Njg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

High fives and fist bumps galore,

Katy Perry

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 10/15/15 and 10/21/15. Enter by donating [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM3NzY2ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODg2Njg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjM3NzY2ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODg2Njg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without donating. One (1) winner will receive two (2) invitations for winner and guest to attend a rally in Iowa and meet Katy Perry, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the rally and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1,700). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=31&ms=MjM3NzY2ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODg2Njg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=32&ms=MjM3NzY2ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODg2Njg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM3NzY2ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODg2Njg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM3NzY2ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODg2Njg0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM3NzY2ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODg2Njg0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=26&ms=MjM3NzY2ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODg2Njg0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjM3NzY2ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODg2Njg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: alexandra4rand2016@gmail.com
subject: Fw: Please reach out to Fellow Conservative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Are you ok?

Rand asked me to reach out to you.

The deadline for Rand to raise $200,000 for his TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa is just over 24 hours away.

And we're still short of reaching our goal.

According to our records, we haven't received your contribution yet.

**Fellow Conservative
[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095607:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)
DONATION STATUS: ## MISSING ##**

Fellow Conservative, the upcoming presidential debate gives Rand the perfect opportunity to counter-attack the media's smear campaign against him -- and filling the Iowa airwaves with TV and radio ads will maximize the effectiveness.

**[So after you read Rand's message below, it's critical you make your most generous contribution before we run out of time](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095607:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095608:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095609:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095610:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095611:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095607:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)

Thank you,

Alexandra

\---------- BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE ----------

**From** : Rand Paul
**To** : Alexandra
**Subject** : Please reach out to Fellow Conservative

Alexandra,

Please do me a quick favor and contact Fellow Conservative .

I've emailed Fellow Conservative multiple times this past week about my TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa and still haven't heard back yet.

My deadline is just over 24 hours away -- and I need Fellow Conservative's support to make sure we hit our $200,000 goal before time runs out.

Every dollar Fellow Conservative can give will help my campaign pay for carefully targeted TV and radio ads to reach as many voters as possible as they watch the third presidential debate.

This plan is so critical, so please follow up with Fellow Conservative as soon as you can.

With Fellow Conservative's help, I'm confident this plan will help my campaign surge to the top of the polls.

Thanks so much, Alexandra!

Rand

_Sent from my iPhone_

* * *

**From** : randhpaulmd@gmail.com
**To** : Fellow Conservative
**Subject** : announcement re: upcoming presidential debate

Fellow Conservative:

Now is our chance.

Despite the media covering this election as if it were a high school popularity contest, the upcoming debate gives my campaign a chance to break through.

You and I both watched the Washington Machine and their allies in the media enact a media blackout to try and stop my father's presidential campaign...

...And now they're doing the exact same thing to me.

That's why, today, I'm announcing a TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa to pepper the airwaves and reach as many voters as possible during and after the next Republican presidential debate.

I'm ready to fight in the next debate, Fellow Conservative. And my campaign staff has run the numbers and laid out a detailed plan to maximize this opportunity. We need to raise $200,000 before Tuesday, October 20th to make this work.

**[And I'm counting on you to please stand with me during this most critical time by making your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095607:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)**.

America is on the brink of even more turmoil if patriots like you don't stand up and fight to save it.

For the first time in decades, you and I have a true chance to nominate a Republican who will take a sledgehammer to the Washington Machine.

I first ran for the U.S. Senate to take on this fight to restore our Constitution.

I'm running for President to take our country back.

My plan to institute a 14.5% flat tax, and return $2 TRILLION to the American people, isn't just designed to get our economy moving and create jobs. It's designed to blow up our current tax code and force government to live within its means.

My plan to impose term limits in Washington, D.C. isn't just designed to change a few faces in Congress. It's designed to clean house of Big Government career politicians.

My plan to force Congress to read the bills they pass isn't just designed to force members of Congress to stop passing thousand-page bills at the last minute, it's designed to END lobbyists' grip on Washington, D.C.

If elected, I will fully REPEAL ObamaCare, end domestic government spying and finally audit and expose the damage the U.S. Federal Reserve has wreaked on our country.

Not one of my opponents can make any of these promises -- let alone point to a track record of delivering on the promises they make.

Whether it's foreign policy, government spying or just Big Government in general, it's all just pandering, hot air and half-truths.

But Fellow Conservative, you do have a choice.

You can choose to return to the constitutional principles that have made America great.

You can choose a candidate who can not only DEFEAT Hillary Clinton, but is committed to restoring the principles of liberty you and I hold so dear.

**[So please help me by chipping in your most generous contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095607:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)**.

We only have until October 20th to hit our $200,000 goal. This is the most critical moment of my campaign to date. So every dollar counts.

I'm confident this TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa is just what we need to break the media's stranglehold on my campaign.

But this plan can only be successful with your help.

With my deadline rapidly approaching, **[will you please chip in a contribution IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095607:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)**?

This is our chance to fight back -- to end the media's false narrative against our movement.

We must break through, Fellow Conservative.

And it starts in Iowa.

Thank you in advance for your generous and continued support.

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095608:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095609:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095610:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095611:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095607:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095607:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095612:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095613:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31095614:WH4AJqm3N:m:1:879035888:9D113CB02565C945D345DEC0A70E8083:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Why I'm rejecting Martin Shkreli's money
body:
#
[**When prescription drug price gouger Martin Shkreli tried to donate $2,700 to our campaign to get a meeting with me, I donated his money to an AIDS clinic. Now I'm asking you to join our fight against corporate greed by making your own contribution of $25.66 -- the average contribution we've received this past week.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25c0/43f17890/55d4eae0/621f7e85/2958673427/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/billionaire-class?refcode=em151019-shkreli-full")

* * *

Brothers and Sisters -
A Wall Street hedge fund manager named Martin Shkreli decided that he could make a lot of money off a life-saving drug for AIDS patients and other sick people by jacking the price from $13.50 per tablet to $750. Sick people be damned.
I started a congressional investigation into his price gouging. Shkreli promised to reduce the price, though he hasn't done so yet.
But Martin Shkreli was angry. **He didn't like that I criticized him, so he tried to get a private meeting with me. And he thought the best way to do that was by donating $2,700 to our campaign.**
That may be how other campaigns work. **Not ours.** We are taking Martin Shkreli's $2,700 donation and are giving it straight to an AIDS clinic in Washington, DC.
Now I'm turning to you, brothers and sisters, for help. I don't need money from people like Martin Shkreli and the billionaire class. **I need you**.
[**Make a contribution of $25.66 -- the average contribution we've received this past week -- to our campaign to join the fight against corporate greed. Together, we can show Martin Shkreli and the billionaire class that they can't have it all.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25c0/43f17890/55d4eae0/621f7e85/2958673427/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/billionaire-class?refcode=em151019-shkreli-full")
The economic and political systems of this country are stacked against ordinary Americans. The rich get richer and use their wealth to buy elections and legislation.
Saying to Wall Street and the drug companies and the rest of the billionaire class, "please, do the right thing" while taking their money to fund your campaign is both naive and ultimately ineffective.
If we're serious about creating jobs and health care for all, and addressing climate change and the needs of our children and the elderly, we must be serious about campaign finance reform.
So far we've funded our campaign with more than 1.3 million contributions of about $30 a piece. Small contributions of whatever regular folks can afford will win the fight against corporate greed and beat the influence of oligarchs like Martin Shkreli.
[**Say you stand with me in the fight against corporate greed: Please make a contribution of $25.66 -- the average contribution we've received this past week -- to our campaign now.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25c0/43f17890/55d4eae0/621f7e85/2958673427/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/billionaire-class?refcode=em151019-shkreli-full")
When people come together, anything is possible. And together, we can take our country back from the billionaire class.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25c0/43f17890/55d4eae0/621f7e85/2958673427/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/billionaire-class?refcode=em151019-shkreli-full")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25c0/43f17890/55d4eae0/621f7e82/2958673427/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25c0/43f17890/55d4eae0/621f7e83/2958673427/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25c0/43f17890/55d4eae0/621f7e80/2958673427/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25c0/43f17890/55d4eae0/621f7e81/2958673427/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: Put me over the top?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

My campaign's deadline to raise the $200,000 we need to begin plastering Iowa's radio and TV ads ahead of the next Republican Debate is just over 24 hours from right now.

We're inching closer every second...

But I'm counting on a last-minute surge of momentum from good folks like you to help put me over the top.

**[Will you please agree to your most generous gift of $20.16 or more right away to bust through the media blackout and help put us over the top](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31104258:WTKmXqmHN:m:1:879035888:1C3B877329CF9482BE410581AC084ACD:r)**?

As Big Government GOP establishment candidates are looking weaker by the day -- and Hillary Clinton's campaign flounders -- the national media is doing whatever they can to turn the 2016 Republican Presidential race into a sideshow.

The last thing they want is a tried-and-true Republican presidential nominee with a history of standing up to the Washington Machine and winning!

Whether it's forcing the Obama administration to back down on the use of drones targeting U.S. citizens on American soil, President Obama's attempt to rush to ISIS' aid in Syria -- or forcing the worst of the so-called "PATRIOT Act's" provisions to expire, I have proven I will stand up to anyone in either party to uphold my oath of office.

The Washington Machine knows the concrete plans I've laid out throughout this campaign would usher in a limited government revolution that would shake Washington, D.C. to its core, including:

*** My plan to institute a 14.5% flat tax, and return $2 TRILLION to the American people, isn't just designed to get our economy moving and create jobs.

It's designed to END the IRS, blow up our current tax code and force government to live within its means! No other candidate's tax plan comes close.

*** My plan to impose term limits in Washington, D.C. isn't just designed to change a few faces in Congress.

It's designed to clean house of ALL Big Government career politicians in BOTH parties!

*** My plan to force Congress to read the bills they pass isn't just designed to force members of Congress to stop passing thousand-page bills at the last-minute.

It's designed to END lobbyists' grip on Washington, D.C. by ensuring they can't chock massive spending bills full of taxpayer-funded goodies and "deals" for their special interest cronies!

*** My plan to audit the Federal Reserve isn't just designed to ensure more transparency of our nation's central bank.

It's designed to STOP Fed-created economic bubbles, and wipe out the culture of insider loans, bailouts and cronyism that are ravaging our nation's finances!

If elected, I will fully REPEAL ObamaCare, secure our borders, tell government snoops to spy on the terrorists -- not innocent Americans -- and restore the entire Bill of Rights.

But I'm counting on you to help me break through the media blackout and help me go straight to Iowa voters with a flood of TV and radio ads ahead of the next Republican debate.

**[Will you please agree to a generous gift of $20.16 or more today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31104258:WTKmXqmHN:m:1:879035888:1C3B877329CF9482BE410581AC084ACD:r)**?

Help me bring my message of liberty straight to Iowa voters.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31104259:WTKmXqmHN:m:1:879035888:1C3B877329CF9482BE410581AC084ACD:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31104260:WTKmXqmHN:m:1:879035888:1C3B877329CF9482BE410581AC084ACD:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31104261:WTKmXqmHN:m:1:879035888:1C3B877329CF9482BE410581AC084ACD:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31104262:WTKmXqmHN:m:1:879035888:1C3B877329CF9482BE410581AC084ACD:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31104258:WTKmXqmHN:m:1:879035888:1C3B877329CF9482BE410581AC084ACD:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31104258:WTKmXqmHN:m:1:879035888:1C3B877329CF9482BE410581AC084ACD:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31104263:WTKmXqmHN:m:1:879035888:1C3B877329CF9482BE410581AC084ACD:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31104264:WTKmXqmHN:m:1:879035888:1C3B877329CF9482BE410581AC084ACD:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31104265:WTKmXqmHN:m:1:879035888:1C3B877329CF9482BE410581AC084ACD:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Anna Rogers, MarcoRubio.com
subject: what 21,619 people did
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44498441:6OXZDlL6N:m:1:1349778030:4E944DAA4A9426175B83060B9EE77C1D:r)
---
| July-September 2015
---
| | | | | [**JOIN THEM** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44498441:6OXZDlL6N:m:1:1349778030:4E944DAA4A9426175B83060B9EE77C1D:r)
---
| Peter, Last week we released our latest campaign fundraising report and one number really jumped out at me and I had to share it with you. From July to September **21,619 of our supporters became donors for the first time!** That means that _62% of our donors during that time period were first-time givers._ Marco's momentum is growing, and we want you to be a part of this. **[Click here to donate $25 (our most frequently made donation) to help Marco and join them in becoming a first-time donor.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44498441:6OXZDlL6N:m:1:1349778030:4E944DAA4A9426175B83060B9EE77C1D:r)** Our first-time donors gave more than $3.5 million during the most recent quarter and that has made a tremendous impact towards ensuring that Marco's optimistic message and our positive campaign continue to reach more and more Americans every day. We are just a few short months away from the first caucuses and primary elections of 2016, so if you were ever considering donating for the first time, **[now's the perfect time to chip in and donate whatever you can.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44498441:6OXZDlL6N:m:1:1349778030:4E944DAA4A9426175B83060B9EE77C1D:r)** Sincerely, Anna RogersFinance DirectorMarco Rubio for President

name: Jen Palmieri, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: Trey Gowdy wants you to forget this:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Watch: Hillary as Secretary of State | Friend --

It says something about Hillary's tenure as our nation's Secretary of State that when you watch a video recapping it, you well up a little bit.

**But don 't take my word for it -- **[watch this new video about the job Hillary did as our nation's chief diplomat, and then pass it along to others:****

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM3ODYxNjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxOTgwOTcxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
During her years as Secretary of State, Hillary worked with leaders abroad, along with Democrats and Republicans at home, and they all praised her performance. She made huge strides for LGBT people and women and girls across the globe, and helped enact the tough sanctions that brought Iran to the negotiating table.

When she left office, her former rival President Obama said: "I think Hillary will go down as one of the finest Secretaries of State we've had."

**We need to make sure everyone knows it. Watch the video, then share it with others:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/smart-leadership/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjM3ODYxNjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxOTgwOTcxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Jen

Jennifer Palmieri
Communications Director
Hillary for America

| **Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjM3ODYxNjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxOTgwOTcxS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjM3ODYxNjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxOTgwOTcxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM3ODYxNjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxOTgwOTcxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM3ODYxNjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxOTgwOTcxS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM3ODYxNjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxOTgwOTcxS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjM3ODYxNjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxOTgwOTcxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185 [Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM3ODYxNjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxOTgwOTcxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
